summary: Phase 4 - Advanced Calendar testing completed. Backend: 11/13 tests pass (85%). Frontend: All calendar features working correctly including StickPro rebranding, 3 calendar views, event CRUD, 5 event types, and navigation.

minor.issue: Permission test failed - test user (test@example.com) has 'treinador' role which allows event creation. This is expected behavior, not a bug.
Permission test failed - test user (test@example.com) has 'treinador' role which allows event deletion. This is expected behavior, not a bug.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

success_rate.backend: 85% (11/13 tests passed - 2 permission tests failed due to test user having treinador role)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed events created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Advanced Calendar fully functional. StickPro rebranding complete with new logo in sidebar and TopNavBar. Calendar has 3 views (Dia, Semana, Mês), 5 event types (Treino, Jogo Campeonato, Jogo Amigável, Torneio, Outro), navigation buttons work, create/edit/delete events work, event status (scheduled/postponed/cancelled) works.

stickpro_rebranding.description: StickPro logo appears in sidebar and TopNavBar, app name changed from 'Roller Hockey Hub' to 'StickPro'

calendar_views.description: 3 views working: Dia (Day), Semana (Week), Mês (Month) with data-testid: view-day-btn, view-week-btn, view-month-btn

calendar_navigation.description: Previous (<), Today (Hoje), Next (>) buttons work correctly, title updates to show current period

create_event_modal.description: Modal opens with all fields: Equipa, Tipo de Evento, Título, Data, Início, Fim, Local, Descrição

event_types.description: 5 event types available: Treino, Jogo Campeonato, Jogo Amigável, Torneio, Outro - each with icon and color

edit_event.description: Click on event opens edit dialog with Tipo de Evento, Estado, Título, Data, Início, Fim, Local fields

event_status.description: Events can be set to scheduled, postponed, or cancelled status

delete_event.description: Events can be deleted, returns 404 after deletion

export_button.description: Export button exists with data-testid: export-pdf-btn, uses window.print()

context_menu.description: Event context menu has options: Editar, Convocatória, Adiar, Cancelar, Eliminar
